samples.xml_description:
Implement a right shifter. Clock. Input signal to be right-shifted. Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation. None sequential_logic Register is defined as reg [7:0] q and initialized to 0 using the initial statement. sequential_logic Value of q is right-shifted by 1 bit using the >> operator: q <= (q >> 1). sequential_logic Most significant bit (q[7]) of the register is assigned the value of the input signal (d): q[7] <= d. The register is defined as reg [7:0] q and initialized to 0 using the initial statement.
The value of q is right-shifted by 1 bit using the >> operator: q <= (q >> 1).
The most significant bit (q[7]) of the register is assigned the value of the input signal (d): q[7] <= d.
